svg.aria-label: Project graph: engram, the neural-modeling hub, and crebain, the multi-UAV simulation and airspace-awareness testbed, connect through the always-on, two-way NCP protocol to prisoma, a private hub; pid-rs, cobot-atlas, melkor and relief-atlas connect to prisoma; cobot-atlas, melkor and relief-atlas also connect to crebain, as does manwe, the drone-detection eye feeding crebain; cortexel connects to engram; galadriel, a public cross-sensor statistical-consistency monitor, connects to crebain and pid-rs; haldir, the fail-closed authorization gate that admits a signed controller intent and re-originates the plant command under its own key, connects to NCP, galadriel and prisoma.
svg.text: THE SYSTEM // HOW THE WORK CONNECTS
